query: Adjust the LLaMA instruct parameters: set temperature to 0.8 and max tokens to 512.

desired.outcome: The LLaMA CPP instruct node uses the new temperature and max_tokens values
desired.quality: All connections preserved, no dangling nodes, workflow runs with adjusted parameters

_tags.author_rationale: Most specific and natural for low-complexity edit — a clear parameter adjustment a user would make.
